title: rubus dryadeus
intro: Rubus dryadeus, also known as the Dryad's sword or Black raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its rich content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus dryadeus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus dryadeus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
